reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza q desde Noviembre tiene rota la bomba del surtidor de nafta infinita Es un ACA no una estación de barrio Nunca lo arreglan o no se reclama como corresponde

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that the infinite gasoline pump has been broken since November. It's an ACA, not a neighborhood station. They never fix it or don't complain about it properly.
